iti45:1.1: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
iti45:2.1:
“Monks, live enjoying aloofness, delighting in aloofness, inwardly committed to awareness-tranquility,
not neglecting jhāna, endowed with clear-seeing insight, and frequenting empty buildings.
iti45:2.2:
As you live enjoying aloofness, delighting in aloofness,
inwardly committed to awareness-tranquility, not neglecting jhāna,
endowed with clear-seeing insight, and frequenting empty buildings, then one of two fruits can be expected:
iti45:2.3: either gnosis right in the here-&-now, or–if there be any remnant of clinging-sustenance–non-return.”
iti45:4.4: are right in the presence of Unbinding.
